sqls.name: view_1
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_1 AS SELECT water_usage_data.Irrigation_Method, water_usage_data.Water_Consumption_liters_hectare, AVG(crop_production_data.Yield_quintals) AS Avg_Yield_quintals FROM water_usage_data JOIN crop_production_data ON water_usage_data.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop AND water_usage_data.District = crop_production_data.District GROUP BY water_usage_data.Irrigation_Method, water_usage_data.Water_Consumption_liters_hectare

sqls.name: view_2
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_2 AS SELECT water_usage_data.Crop, water_usage_data.Water_Consumption_liters_hectare, MAX(crop_production_data.Yield_quintals) AS Max_Yield_quintals FROM water_usage_data JOIN crop_production_data ON water_usage_data.Crop = crop_production_data.Crop AND water_usage_data.District = crop_production_data.District GROUP BY water_usage_data.Crop, water_usage_data.Water_Consumption_liters_hectare

sqls.name: view_3
sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW view_3 AS SELECT soil_analysis_data.Soil_Type, soil_analysis_data.Organic_Matter, water_usage_data.District, MAX(crop_price_data.Price_INR_quintal) AS Avg_Price_INR_quintal FROM soil_analysis_data JOIN water_usage_data ON soil_analysis_data.District = water_usage_data.District JOIN crop_price_data ON soil_analysis_data.District = crop_price_data.District AND water_usage_data.Crop = crop_price_data.Crop GROUP BY soil_analysis_data.Soil_Type, soil_analysis_data.Organic_Matter, water_usage_data.District

outputs.sqlErrMsg: Execution failed on sql 'SELECT * FROM view_1': no such column: water_usage_data.Irrigation_Method
